Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Titan Knights]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — The Titan Knights took care of the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Titan Knights are a group that people can be fans of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Raion was the leader of the Titan Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Titan Knights officially completed their mission by driving off the D’Niss Swarm.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Titan Knights are potential targets for Starhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Javik and Undermaker are former Titan Knights.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — The Titan Knights are a group of five individuals including Raion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Titan Knights serve as guardians of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Varic Vallenar is welcomed to the Titan Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The Titan Knights fared worse in this life than in the narrator's memory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The narrator did not join the Titan Knights in a previous life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The Titan Knights were formed to fight the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — The Titan Knights have a training room consisting of a mechanical collection of enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — The Titan Knights were extremely popular in their heyday.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — A new generation of Titan Knights will be produced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Shyrax addresses the Titan Knights.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
